title: DM test: Transformer (new pre-reg winner) vs HAR-RV
method: DM test on squared forecast error, H2 (2010-2014), 5 US assets. Negative DM stat = Transformer wins (lower error).
headline: Transformer (new pre-reg winner) has significantly lower squared forecast error than HAR-RV on ALL 5 US assets on H2 (2010-2014), all p<0.0001. DM statistics range from -4.2 to -11.4. This is the strongest result for the paper.
